ai_analysis.quality_context: W Residences Dubai - The Palm is a premier ultra-luxury branded development located on the exclusive Western Crescent of Palm Jumeirah. This 4-bedroom residence is exceptionally large at 14,329 sqft, offering a 'mansion-style' footprint with premium branded finishes including Poliform, Miele, Dekton, and Listone Giordano. risk_flags: Significant Price/Sqft Discrepancy: The asking rate of AED 2,792/sqft is vastly below the stated market median of AED 7,995/sqft. This indicates that a substantial portion of the 14,329 sqft likely consists of outdoor terrace space, which has a lower valuation density than internal built-up area (BUA).

High Holding Costs: Branded residences on the Palm, especially those with private club access and five-star hotel integration, carry exceptionally high annual service charges that will heavily compress net rental yields.
Crescent Logistics: The Western Crescent offers unmatched privacy and sunset views but suffers from longer commute times to the mainland compared to properties on the Palm Trunk.
Niche Liquidity: At a AED 40,000,000 ticket size, the buyer pool is highly restricted, which may prolong the exit timeline in a market downturn.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: Priced at AED 40,000,000 (AED 2,792/sqft), this property represents an opportunistic entry point into Palm Jumeirah's ultra-luxury branded segment, trading at a steep discount to the area's median unit rate of AED 7,995/sqft. While the massive square footage is highly likely terrace-heavy, the absolute pricing for a vacant, turn-key asset of this caliber is highly competitive. This property is best suited for an ultra-high-net-worth end-user or a capital appreciation investor looking to acquire prime, ready-to-move-in waterfront real estate at a below-market rate per foot.

description:

The villa has been well maintained and is situated in a prime location, just minutes from the

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is listed as a 'Legacy Large' villa, which is a highly popular and spacious 3-bedroom layout known for its practical open-plan design and family-friendly appeal. However, there is a critical geographical discrepancy: the listing is categorized under 'Emirates Hills' (one of Dubai's most exclusive ultra-luxury communities), but the description explicitly places it in 'Jumeirah Park'. Jumeirah Park is a premium, established villa community, but it operates at a significantly lower price point than Emirates Hills. The listed price of AED 1,351/sqft is being compared to a market median of AED 2,680/sqft, which is highly misleading as that median reflects Emirates Hills prices, not Jumeirah Park.
risk_flags: Critical Location Discrepancy: The listing is miscategorized under 'Emirates Hills' to artificially show a ~50% discount against a high market median, whereas the property is actually located in 'Jumeirah Park'.

Size Metric Confusion: The listed 5,698 sqft likely represents the plot size rather than the Built-Up Area (BUA). A standard 3-bedroom Legacy Large villa typically has a BUA of approximately 3,527 sqft. If the total price (~AED 7.7M) is calculated against the actual BUA, the real price per sqft rises to ~AED 2,180, which is significantly above the Jumeirah Park market average.
Misleading Marketing: The 'Lowest Price' claim in the title is highly suspect given the neighborhood mislabeling and potential plot vs. BUA size inflation.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: While Jumeirah Park is a highly stable residential community with strong rental demand and consistent capital appreciation, this specific listing is highly misleading. The apparent 50% discount to the market median is an illusion created by comparing a Jumeirah Park villa to Emirates Hills market data. An investor must ignore the provided market median and re-evaluate the property using actual Jumeirah Park benchmarks (where average BUA prices range from AED 1,300 to AED 1,600/sqft). Verify the actual BUA on the title deed before proceeding, as the property may actually be overpriced if the BUA is standard.

title: Priced to Sell | High ROI | 2 Parkings | Golf View
description:

ai_analysis.quality_context: Marina Heights is an established, mid-tier residential tower completed in 2006, located in the high-demand northern district of Dubai Marina. Priced at AED 1,546 per sqft, the property sits at a massive ~32% discount to the Dubai Marina market median of AED 2,278 per sqft. risk_flags: Building Age & CapEx: Completed in 2006, the building may require higher maintenance fees, and the unit itself may need significant capital expenditure (renovation) to command premium market rents.

Slower Capital Appreciation: Older towers in Dubai Marina typically experience slower capital growth compared to newer, premium waterfront developments in the same area.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property is a classic 'value-add' defensive play. The steep 32% discount to the market median provides a strong safety margin and downside protection. While the building's age limits rapid capital appreciation, the combination of immediate rental income, a spacious layout, and the rare asset of two parking spaces ensures high rental liquidity and strong net yields. This is a highly recommended buy for income-focused investors looking to secure stable, above-average ROI in a prime, high-occupancy location, with the long-term option to renovate and flip for capital gains upon tenant exit.

Conveniently located in the heart of Dubai Marina, there is easy access to Sheikh Zayed Road, tram, metro as well as Marina Walk and the beach. This apartment has 2 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and a semi closed kitchen with large living room. The size of this apartment ensures the space is very open and bright. The apartment has floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking media city. The apartment is located on a mid floor and is currently tenanted until end of august.

Index tower was designed by Foster and Partners. The Building provides residents the opportunity to live in one Dubai’s most iconic buildings. The residences start from the 32nd floor and whether you have the iconic view of the Burj Khalifa or the bustling DIFC gate avenue aspect, with the Museum of the Future as a vista, you will find it hard to beat.

The Index mall, which provides residents a combination of restaurants, coffee shops and supermarkets, is also directly connected to the DIFC Gate Avenue. This provides the walkability factor that many residents in DIFC crave.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

Location and Connectivity:

Binghatti Apex is situated within Jumeirah Village Circle, one of Dubai's most sought-after family-friendly communities developed by Nakheel. The community boasts over 30 landscaped parks, cycling and jogging paths, supermarkets including Spinneys and Choithrams, healthcare facilities, and Circle Mall  a full-scale retail and dining destination. Schools, nurseries, and cafes are embedded throughout the neighbourhood, making everyday living effortlessly convenient.

Strategically positioned between Al Khail Road and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, JVC offers excellent connectivity across Dubai. Dubai Marina, Business Bay, and Palm Jumeirah are all easily accessible, while the Mall of the Emirates metro station provides a public transport link to the wider city.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact Hunter Steele Newman.

description:
Betterhomes proudly presents 1 bedroom apartment in Armada tower 3 - Cluster P - JLT 

Property Highlights:
Rented Currently - No notice served 
Park and Jumeirah Island view
Stunning Huge Balcony space
Standard unit 
Spacious & Functional Layout
Mid Floor Unit
Bright and Airy
1 Allocated Parking Space

Armada Tower 3 is situated in the lively JLT conveniently placed within close proximity of key landmarks in Dubai such as Dubai Marina, The Palm and JBR Beach. JLT offers a range of benefits to residents such as a wide range of restaurants, transport links and directly off Sheikh Zayed Road. Also a high-rise building in Jumeirah Lake Towers, a mixed-use development best known for its beautiful man-made lakes and manicured gardens. The residential building is a part of the Armada Towers complex and is located in Cluster P, JLT.

Tower 3 developed by Armada Group has 36 floors above ground and three floors below ground along with retail options on the ground level. The residential building stands 493 sq. ft. tall. The high-rise is designed by Adnan Saffarini. Its construction started in 2005 and was completed in 2009.

Offering contemporary finishes, premium amenities and a prime golf course adjacent location, this apartment is ideal for both end users and investors.

	•	One Bedroom
	•	One Bathroom

	•	Brand New

	•	Modern Open Plan Layout
	•	High Quality Finishing

	•	Swimming Pool + Gym Access

This bright and modern one-bedroom apartment features a spacious open-plan kitchen, living and dining area designed to maximise natural light throughout the property. The bedroom includes built-in wardrobes and a well-appointed bathroom finished to a high standard. The large balcony offers a peaceful outdoor space with community views, perfect for relaxing or entertaining.

Vida Residences Club Point is a newly launched residential development completing in 2029, offering residents access to world-class amenities and a vibrant lifestyle. Positioned next to Dubai Hills Golf Club and with easy access to major road networks, the community provides seamless connectivity to Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina and key areas across the city.

Contact us today at Betterhomes to arrange a viewing on this highly in demand property.

raw_area: Damac Bay Tower B, Damac Bay, Dubai Harbour, Dubai
description:
Premium one-bedroom waterfront apartment for sale in DAMAC Bay Tower B by Cavalli, located at EMAAR Beachfront. The home features luxury interiors designed by Roberto Cavalli and is marketed below the original price level as stated. Handover is expected in Q2 2027 and the unit is offered on a payment plan.

The apartment includes a huge private balcony accessible from both the bedroom and the living room, creating a strong indoor-to-outdoor lifestyle feel. Floor-to-ceiling panoramic windows enhance natural light and the open sea atmosphere. The kitchen is equipped, and the layout includes one en-suite bathroom plus a separate powder room for guest convenience.

DAMAC Bay by Cavalli is designed as a resort-style beachfront address with private beach access, three infinity pools, a water fountain feature, a rooftop opera pavilion, and the Cavalli Lounge, creating a hotel-like leisure routine with a strong branded identity.

The development leans into a maritime luxury theme, combining wave-inspired architecture with nautical interiors by Cavalli. The tower concept is positioned around sea-view living and a dramatic skyline presence at EMAAR Beachfront.

Interested in this property?
Contract Yuriy Pavlikhin today for the full payment plan breakdown, updated availability, and to arrange a private presentation.

title: SPACIOUS 2BR + STUDY | LARGE BALCONY | MODERN
description:
Step into a refined lifestyle with this spacious 2-bedroom + study apartment at Maravéa Residences by Enzo, located in the heart of Dubai Islands—Dubai’s next-generation waterfront destination. Designed as a boutique development with only 63 residences, the project offers privacy, elegance, and a serene coastal living experience

This well-designed apartment spans approximately 1,221  featuring a generous layout that includes two comfortable bedrooms, a dedicated study room, and a bright open-plan living and dining area. The space flows seamlessly onto a large private balcony, perfect for enjoying peaceful community and park views.

Both bedrooms are thoughtfully designed with built-in wardrobes and en-suite bathrooms, offering comfort and privacy. The additional study provides flexibility as a home office or extra functional space. The modern kitchen is fully fitted with high-quality cabinetry and contemporary finishes, blending style with practicality.

Residents benefit from a full lifestyle offering across multiple levels, including an infinity pool, rooftop lounge, gym, yoga and meditation zones, cinema, co-working spaces, BBQ areas, landscaped gardens, and more

Ideally located, the project is just minutes from Dubai Islands Beach and Mall, 15 minutes to Dubai International Airport and DIFC, and within easy reach of Downtown Dubai

Property Details:
• 2 Bedrooms + Study
• Total Area: approx. 1,221 
• Large Balcony
• Open-plan Living & Dining
• Modern Kitchen & Premium Finishes

Price: AED 2,510,000

Payment Plan: 50/50
• 50% during construction
• 50% on handover

Handover: Q4 2028

An excellent opportunity for both end-users and investors seeking space, functionality, and long-term value in a fast-growing waterfront community.

title: ULTRA LUXURY 1 BEDROOM | SEA VIEWS | 50/50 PP
raw_area: Lia by Avenew, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Discover refined waterfront living with this elegant 1-bedroom apartment in LIA by Avenew, located in the heart of Dubai Islands, where the serenity of the Arabian Gulf meets the vibrancy of a contemporary marina. Designed with balance, light, and functionality in mind, this residence reflects a modern coastal lifestyle shaped by nature and architectural precision.

The apartment offers a total area of 831 sq. ft. with a well-proportioned layout featuring an open-plan living and dining area seamlessly connected to a modern kitchen. The bedroom is complemented by a walk-in closet and an en-suite master bathroom, while a separate powder room and dedicated laundry space enhance everyday convenience. Floor-to-ceiling windows allow natural light to flow throughout, opening onto a private balcony ideal for relaxation.

LIA is a boutique G+8 residential building comprising only 81 exclusive residences, crafted with flowing architectural lines, tiered balconies, and lush greenery. Residents enjoy world-class amenities including a podium-level infinity pool, pool bar, fully equipped gym, lounge deck, BBQ areas, kids’ play zone, and a grand triple-height lobby designed as a serene arrival experience.

Strategically positioned, Dubai Islands offers a unique balance of tranquility and accessibility, with easy connections to Downtown Dubai, Dubai International Airport, retail, dining, and leisure destinations.

Price: AED 2,000,000

Payment Plan:
10% down payment + 4% DLD
10% after 1 month
10% June 2026
5% December 2026
10% June 2027
5% December 2027
50% on completion

Anticipated completion: Q1 2028

An ideal opportunity for both end-users and investors seeking understated luxury by the sea.

title: Exclusive Resale of 4-Bed Duplex on the Palm
description:
We are pleased to present this stylish four-bedroom duplex apartment at Orla Infinity, a stunning residential tower situated along the Crescent of Palm Jumeirah. 

This low-rise complex contains just 20 residences that offer a resort lifestyle. Situated on lower levels, the duplex features soaring double-height ceilings with full-length glass panels that create a seamless connection between interior and exterior spaces. A spacious open plan living room flows around to a dining space and an exquisite open kitchen with integrated appliances and a breakfast bar. A closed and fully equipped service kitchen adjoins it.

Each bedroom is a small residence in itself, with a spacious layout, large built-in wardrobes, and elegant en-suites with high-quality fittings. The bedrooms also have access to private balconies from where they can enjoy panoramic views over the sea and the beachfront. The apartment also offers a private swimming pool on the terrace with soaring views of the Palm Jumeirah.

Orla Infinity is serviced by The Dorchester Collection, providing residents with access to bespoke five-star services and facilities. It has an enviable selection of amenities on-site, including the Orla Beach Club, a sunset lounge, an indoor pool, a cycling studio, a private cigar lounge, and a private cinema. Owing to its excellent location on the Palm, Orla infinity is a short drive from several notable attractions such as Palm West Beach and is also close to some of Dubai’s best restaurants, helmed by esteemed names such as Nobu Matsuhisa, Akira Back, and Jose Andres.

Please contact us today for more details on this magnificent residence.

title: Investor Deal | Luxury 1BR Waterfront Living
description:
Presented by Betterhomes
, this elegant 1-bedroom apartment in Marina Views at Rashid Yachts & Marina offers a rare opportunity to own a premium waterfront residence

Spanning 742.38 sq.ft, the apartment is thoughtfully designed with contemporary interiors, spacious living areas, and floor-to-ceiling windows that maximize natural light and create a seamless connection to the vibrant marina surroundings. The modern layout combines comfort and sophistication, making it ideal for both investors and end users seeking long-term value in a prestigious community.

Marina Views forms part of the iconic Rashid Yachts & Marina master development, where Riviera-inspired elegance meets Dubai’s dynamic urban lifestyle. Set within the historic Port Rashid district, the community is designed around a world-class marina capable of accommodating luxury yachts, alongside beautifully landscaped promenades, fine dining, boutique retail, and exclusive leisure experiences.

Residents will enjoy a wide range of premium amenities including swimming pools, fitness facilities, waterfront relaxation areas, and easy access to Dubai’s key landmarks. Perfectly positioned, the development offers excellent connectivity with Downtown Dubai just 10 minutes away and Dubai International Airport reachable within 15 minutes.

This elegant 2-bedroom apartment plus maid’s room features 4 modern bathrooms and a fully equipped kitchen with high-quality built-in appliances. A separate laundry room comes complete with a washer and dryer for added convenience.

The apartment boasts floor-to-ceiling windows that fill the space with natural light, creating bright and inviting rooms. Additional features include built-in wardrobes and thoughtfully designed interiors that combine comfort with style.

title: Prime Location | Investment | Modern Tower
developer_name: a podium and feature a stunning fa
description:
Betterhomes is delighted to offer you this luxurious One Bedroom Apartment for sale in prestigious Sparkle Tower 3, Dubai Marina. 

One of Dubai Marina's most iconic residential developments, Sparkle Towers is a twin-tower complex created in partnership with renowned Austrian crystal brand Swarovski and completed in 2020. The towers are connected by a podium and feature a stunning façade illuminated by over 1,700 lights and adorned with Swarovski crystal accents, creating a brilliant, jewel-like glow at night. 

Residents enjoy an impressive selection of amenities, including a fully equipped fitness center, spa, temperature-controlled swimming pools, separate saunas and Jacuzzis for men and women, and an exclusive residents' lounge. Ideally located along Marina Walk, Sparkle Towers offers easy access to the beach, Dubai Metro, and a variety of waterfront dining and leisure destinations. 

Property Features:
- Low Floor
- 800.73 Sq. Ft. 
- Ready to Move In
- Community View

- Swimming Pool & Gym
- Allotted Basement Parking Space
- Close to Restaurants, Shops, Mall
- Contact the Consultant for more information or to arrange a viewing.

title: Stunning Beachfront Apartment on Palm Jumeirah
raw_area: Orla by Omniyat, The Crescent, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai
description:
This spectacular four bedroom apartment is positioned within the highly prestigious Orla by Omniyat — managed by Dorchester Collection — on the Palm’s Crescent.

Crafted by Foster + Partners with a vision to establish a strong and seamless connection between the indoors and outdoors, it spans 8,010 sq.ft. and presents exceptionally tasteful interiors.

The living area comes as the apartment’s social and entertainment core. Double-height ceilings enhance the sense of scale and light, with the full-height glazing framing framing views of the Palm and the Arabian sea. Just outside, a vast balcony offers the perfect al fresco space with unbeatable vistas and the comfort of a private swimming pool.

Sleek and well-appointed with top-tier European appliances, the show kitchen is supported by a closed preparation kitchen — making for an elaborate culinary setup. Each bedroom is ensuite, and served by generous balconies.

The home also benefits from a maid’s room, an office, and four parking spaces, alongside Orla’s world-class facilities. Stationed minutes from Atlantis the Palm and Atlantis The Royal, its setting places prime lifestyle, entertainment and dining destinations at the doorstep.

Palm Jumeirah stands as an iconic address worldwide. Well connected to Dubai’s key thoroughfares, it places coveted destinations including The View at The Palm, Palm West Beach, Club Vista Mare, and Palm Jumeirah Mall at a convenient distance.

Reach out to us to know more about this exquisite home.

Seapoint is the exclusive waterfront development at Emaar Beachfront, developed by Emaar Properties. With access to the flanked paradise of 450 meters of white sand sandy beaches, lined with its leisure promenade available at service.  The towers come with boasted views of the Sea and Dubai Marina as well as podium level facilities and a largest swimming pool at service.

The environment around the community is very surprising and attractive where you can spend the very best life with the people you love within a community like this. Live the seaside dream at this destination that is vibrant by day and enchanting by the night, as well as the place offers gleaming white yachts. Wake up every day with the sunrise over the bay filled with attractions and leisure areas.

If you would like more information, please contact our Senior Client Advisor Mevand Wassel.

title: LUXURY BEACH LIVING | HIGH-END FINISH | PRIME DEAL
description:
Step into refined waterfront living at Cheval Residences, an exclusive collection of serviced residences on Dubai Islands, developed by Avenew Development in collaboration with Wadeen Developers. Designed with a focus on elegance, balance, and seamless indoor-outdoor living, this project offers a truly elevated lifestyle. 

This beautifully designed 1-bedroom residence offers a spacious and practical layout with a total size of 801  including a private balcony that enhances the living experience. The unit features a welcoming entrance, a stylish open kitchen, a dedicated laundry space, a guest powder room, and a well-appointed bedroom with dressing area and en-suite bathroom — all crafted with attention to detail and modern sophistication.

The living and dining area flows effortlessly onto the balcony, creating a perfect space to relax and unwind while enjoying the serene surroundings.

Price: AED 2,678,000

Residents benefit from world-class amenities including:


Infinity pool and pool deck

Fully equipped gym

Direct beach access

Rooftop terrace

Elegant lobby and concierge services


Cheval Residences blends the comfort of a private home with the sophistication of a luxury hospitality brand, offering a unique lifestyle experience in one of Dubai’s most promising waterfront destinations.
Payment Plan:


10% down payment + 4% DLD + AED 3,500 booking fee

10% after 1 month

5% in Nov 2026

5% in May 2027

5% in Nov 2027

Betterhomes is pleased to present this well-maintained 1-bedroom apartment in Golf Gate 1, DAMAC Hills. Situated on a lower floor, this bright and modern unit offers open golf views and a comfortable layout, ideal for both end-users and investors. 

About Golf Gate 1

Golf Gate 1 is a brand-new development offering contemporary design and a lifestyle centered around wellness and leisure.

Amenities include:
	•	Swimming pool & gym
	•	Outdoor leisure areas
	•	Modern lobby and security
	•	Relaxing views of greenery and golf surroundings

Located within the prestigious DAMAC Hills, residents enjoy a peaceful, family-friendly environment with lush green spaces and world-class amenities, including access to the Trump International Golf Club Dubai, parks, walking tracks, retail outlets, and leisure facilities. Golf Gate 1 is a brand-new development designed for contemporary living, making it a great choice for those seeking a vibrant community lifestyle with strong future growth potential.

title: Perfect Investment | High Floor | Vacant
description:
Betterhomes is pleased to offer you this stunning One Bedroom apartment located in the Marina Gate Tower 2 by Select Group, Dubai Marina. 

Perfectly positioned at the entrance of Dubai Marina, Marina Gate 2 offers direct access to Marina Walk, and is just minutes from the Metro, Tram, restaurants, cafés, and shops. This is modern waterfront living at its best. 

This one bedroom comes with fitted kitchen appliances, is bright and spacious and it is finished to a very high standard. The apartment has 2 bathrooms, separate laundry area and storage space. There is a balcony from the living room and there are floor to ceiling windows. The apartment is located on a high floor and is overlooking the community. The apartment is vacant and is an ideal option for end users and investors. 

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including two infinity pools, two state-of-the-art gyms, padel and squash courts, basketball/football courts, and the exclusive Amara Lounge. Marina Gate also features the luxurious Jumeirah Living Hotel offering premium services and facilities. 

Property Features:
- Spacious Balcony
- Fully fitted Kitchen
- Laundry Room & Storage Space
- Allotted Covered Parking Space
- 24 hours Concierge
- Infinity pools & Hi-Tech Gymnasium
- Basketball Court & Paddle Court
- Contact the Consultant for more information or to arrange a viewing. 

Finance is available on this property through Betterhomes Mortgage partners.

description:
Turnkey Coastal Serenity with Sunset Views!    
      
Luxury Residences—Dubai’s leading resale and rental agency for Atlantis The Royal Residences and part of the original development sales team—presents this exceptional turnkey home within the new icon of Dubai.    
      
Perfectly positioned to capture golden sunsets, this private residence boasts uninterrupted views across the Arabian Gulf and exquisitely landscaped gardens. Every element has been thoughtfully curated and meticulously enhanced by its current owner to elevate comfort, sophistication, and modern functionality. 
 
Residents of Atlantis The Royal enjoy exclusive Black Tier membership privileges such as 30% discount level to the resort restaurants and spa treatments, and effortless access to world-class amenities, including Michelin-starred dining by global icons, private beach, indoor and outdoor pools, spa and wellness garden, sauna and steam rooms, tennis court, elegant library, resident lounges, business suites, BBQ area with outdoor kitchen, and a state-of-the-art Technogym fitness centre.

The experience is complemented by valet parking, 24-hour concierge services, and a level of discretion and attention to detail found only in the world’s finest 5* branded residences.

Arrange your private viewing today and experience the very definition of coastal elegance and refined living at Atlantis The Royal Residences.

Address JBR is a luxury beachfront residence with stunning views of the iconic Bluewaters Island and Jumeirah Beach. In addition to being a 5-star hotel with 77 floors, The Address Jumeirah is home to some of the best restaurants in Dubai, including Al Qasr Lounge & Bar and The Shore Grill Steakhouse. The hotel has an impressive infinity swimming pool that has been verified by Guinness World Records as the highest in the world. This is the perfect choice to consider as a primary residence or winter getaway.	
		
Jumeirah Beach Residence is in the heart of one of Dubai’s most dynamic and lively urban locations. It's situated close to the city’s thriving business hubs, an evocative beachfront resort for good dining, major attractions, Panoramic views, and entertainment facilities.
